381:       - name: Dispatch workflow queue
382:         if: env.TASK_FOUND == 'true'
383:         shell: bash
384:         env:
385:           GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT || github.token }}
386:           GH_REPOSITORY: ${{ github.repository }}
387:         run: |
388:           mkdir -p governance/workflow_dispatch_results governance/workflow_dispatch_processed
389:           if [ ! -d governance/workflow_dispatch_queue ]; then
390:             echo "No workflow dispatch queue"
391:             exit 0
392:           fi
393:           shopt -s nullglob
394:           for f in governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/*.json; do
395:             WORKFLOW=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(open(sys.argv[1])).get('workflow',''))" "$f")
396:             REF=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(open(sys.argv[1])).get('ref','main'))" "$f")
397:             if [ -z "$WORKFLOW" ]; then
398:               echo "missing_workflow" > "governance/workflow_dispatch_results/$(basename "$f" .json).status"
399:               continue
400:             fi
401:             BODY=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); print(json.dumps({'ref':data.get('ref','main'),'inputs':data.get('inputs',{})}))" "$f")
402:             HTTP_CODE=$(curl -sS -o "governance/workflow_dispatch_results/$(basename "$f" .json).response.json" -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "https://api.github.com/repos/${GH_REPOSITORY}/actions/workflows/${WORKFLOW}/dispatches" -H "Authorization: Bearer ${GH_TOKEN}" -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" -H "X-GitHub-Api-Version: 2022-11-28" -d "$BODY" || echo "000")
403:             echo "$HTTP_CODE" > "governance/workflow_dispatch_results/$(basename "$f" .json).status"
404:             echo "Dispatched ${WORKFLOW}: ${HTTP_CODE}"
405:             mv "$f" "governance/workflow_dispatch_processed/$(basename "$f")"
406:           done
